name: io.github.kakunin-ai/kakunin
description: X.509 identity, risk scoring, and audit logging for AI agents. MiCA + EU AI Act compliant.

environmentVariables.name: KAKUNIN_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Kakunin API key (kak_live_... or kak_test_...). Obtain at https://kakunin.ai/dashboard.

environmentVariables.name: KAKUNIN_AGENT_ID
environmentVariables.description: ID of the agent this MCP server acts on behalf of (agt_...).
